creator: mezz.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
On Sun, Dec 30, 2012 at 2:04 AM, Jan Beich <jbeich@tormail.org> wrote:
> mezz@FreeBSD.org writes:
>
>> Synopsis: [patch] graphics/gimp-app: do not depend on -lexecinfo, it's unused
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
>> State-Changed-By: mezz
>> State-Changed-When: Sun Dec 30 06:18:47 UTC 2012
>> State-Changed-Why:
>> It looks like the current gimp-app in ports tree no longer has get_backtrace()
>> in the app/base/base-utils.c.
>>
>
> My patch is against gimp-2.8 in marcuscom repo.

Ah gotcha, you should have say that in the PR. I have applied it in there.

> Speaking of which, why
> ports/163519 wasn't applied there?

No reason, I must have forgotten to sync in there.

http://www.marcuscom.com:8080/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/ports/graphics/gimp-app/
